app.name: Male Parikshan
app.tagline: Strong Body. Calm Mind. Responsible Man.

dailygoal.title: Daily Goals
dailygoal.subtitle: Set your goals for today. Complete them. Build momentum.
dailygoal.addGoal: Add a new goal for today...
dailygoal.noGoalsDesc: Add a goal above to get started with your day
dailygoal.tip1: Set 3-5 realistic goals per day for best results
dailygoal.tip2: Complete easier goals first to build momentum
dailygoal.tip3: Your goals reset daily—focus on today, not tomorrow

streak.title: NoFap Tracker
streak.subtitle: Self-control through discipline. Freedom through consistency.
streak.checkInQuestion: How was today? Be honest with yourself.
streak.comeBackTomorrow: Come back tomorrow to continue your journey.
streak.fact1: Every day you don't relapse strengthens your neural pathways of self-control.
streak.fact2: Urges are temporary. Discipline is permanent.
streak.fact3: If you relapse, it's not failure—it's data. Learn and restart immediately.
streak.activityDescription: Green blocks = days you stayed consistent. Empty blocks = reset days or before streak started.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.placeholder: Ask me anything about men's health...
